0.2 目的Purpose
heading: 0.2 目的Purpose

text: 本手册之目的是描述医疗器械制造采用的质量管理体系。
The purpose of this manual is to describe in broad terms the Quality Management Systems adopted in the
manufacturing of medical devices.
本手册由品质主管、品质经理和总经理（管理者代表）编写，并获董事总经理批准。
This manual is prepared by Quality Assurance Supervisor, Quality Manager and General Manager (Management
Representative), and approved by Managing Director.
本手册的各章节均有章节号，其与章节0.1“目录”所示相同。
Each chapter in this manual has a chapter number and revision code, which is shown in Chapter 0.1: Table of
Contents”.
本手册如有修订，变更的细节将在“更改历史记录”章节内记录。
If this manual is to be revised, all the change details will be recorded in the chapter of “History of Change”.
本手册内出现的所有法律法规及标准文件，其引用的版本号，均以DCC 发行的法规总表为准。如本手册
中出现的法律法规及标准文件信息与法规总表有差异时，以法规总表为准。
Any discrepancies between the revision of all regulations and specification documents in this manual and
Regulation Summary Table released by DCC department, Regulation Summary Table will prevail. If there is any
discrepancies between the content of all regulations and specification documents in this manual and Regulation
Summary Table released by DCC department, Regulation Summary Table will prevail.

0.3 范围Scope
heading: 0.3 范围Scope

text: 本手册中所描述的质量管理体系适用于本公司所有医疗器械，该体系是基于0.4.1 中所列的标准为指 导文件建立；其满足0.4.2 中所列的适用的法规要求。

The Quality Management System described in this manual applies to all medical devices and is e stablished based on the requirements stated in section 0.4.1. It is intended to meet the regulatio n requirements stated in section 0.4.2.
现时，医科创建集团从事于为客户设计、生产、销售塑料及金属外科手术医疗器械和配件。MC 具有
生产II 类医疗器械的能力（美国的II 类医疗器械、欧盟的II a 及II b 类医疗器械），这些都是一次性 使用器械，包括一次性腹腔手术器械，招风耳矫正器，组织搅拌器、深喉器、硅胶阀及其它相关配件； 这些都不是植入性器械。其中部分器械成品是未灭菌交付客户的，其它的器械是需要通过第三方灭菌 公司进行灭菌后交付客户的。

MediConcepts Group is engaged in the design, manufacture, and sales of plastic and metallic surgi cal devices and components. MediConcepts with specifications developed by or in conjunction with the customer medical devices (Class II is for FDA. Class IIa / IIb is for EU). These devices are mainly single use, including sterile single use laparoscopic and endoscopic instruments; earfold intr oducer; tissue mincing device; laryngoscopes blades; silicone valves and plastic components used i n medical devices which are not active implantable devices. Some of the devices are manufactur ed as finished products ready for sterilization, others may require the product to be sterilized via third party sterilization companies.
另外，力医疗从事于设计、制造、销售一次性腹腔及胸腔穿刺套管及其它一次性腹腔手术器械。另有 设计开发的能力，不时参与于其它医疗器械开发，例如：力医疗参与耳支架的设计。

Nex Medical Limited is engaged in the design, manufacture, sales and distribution of single use e ndoscopic trocars and other single use laparoscopic instruments. Nex Medical have product develo pment capabilities and have been, from time to time, engaged in the design of other medical de vices: for example the design of the introducer for the Earfold Introducer.
MC、MCDP 及NM 所生产的产品没有安装和服务的要求，也不是植入性医疗器械。
No component product or device produced by MediConcepts, MediConcepts Technology or Nex M edical require installation, service or are active implantable devices.
本集团公司制造的产品/配件无安装和服务的特定要求，也不是有源植入医疗器械。故本质量管理 体系不适用7.5.3、7.5.4 和7.5.9.b)条款。

Products and/or components currently manufactured by our Group do not have particular requirements in relation to installation and service. Products and/or components are not active implantable devices. Thus, the Quality Management System excludes the clauses 7.5.3, 7.5.4 and 7.5.9.b).

0.6 分发控制Distribution Control
heading: 0.6 分发控制Distribution Control

text: 质量管理体系内品质部负责人及总经理（管理者代表）原始签名的手册为质量手册之原始版本。本手 册的分发，品质主管将原始版本送交文控中心进行复制和背书。

Only the manual that bears the original signatures of the officer in charge of Quality Management System, and the General Manager (Management Representative) is the original document. To distribute this manual, Quality Supervisor will transfer the original document to the DCC for duplication and endorsement.
文控应在手册之原始版本背面盖上红色的“正本文件”印章，在要分发的副本正面盖上红色的“受控文 件”印章。

The original QM shall be marked original signatures of thy the DCC Clerk. The DCC Clerk shall duplicate sufficient copies, according to the distribution list as shown on the cover page of this manual. All copies for distribution shall be marked “Controlled Document” in red.

1.0 公司简介Company History
heading: 1.0 公司简介Company History

text: 1.1 医科创建MediConcepts Ltd
heading: 1.1 医科创建MediConcepts Ltd

text: 医科创建集团致力于医疗器械生产行业，是一个拥有40 年制造业技术和历史的制造集团的一部 份。如此稳固的基础，使我们能够在各种各样的医疗领域成功地开发并和我们的合作伙伴建立 良好紧密合作关系。这种合作关系无论是长期的代加工生产、初次试产或研究与开发，所有这 些对我们与我们的合作伙伴获取重要的技术知识和技术是极其重要的，也是面对今天医疗行业 的挑战和需要的根本。医科创建专注于代加工生产而力医疗専注于原始品牌开发。医创建科技 (深圳)有限公司为医科创建集团提供生产及硏发。

MediConcepts Group is in the business of medical device manufacturing and is part of a manufacturing group with 40 years of manufacturing know-how. With this solid foundation, we are able to develop and build partnership with customers in various medical fields. Our services include long term contract manufacturing, initial production runs and/or R&D projects. We believe that the partnership with our customers is important as we advance our technical knowledge and know-how with our partners, which is essential to meet the challenges and demands of today’s medical business. MediConcepts (MC) is focusing in OEM business while Nex Medical is focusing in OBM business and MediConcepts Technology is the manufacturing plant for the whole Group.

1.2 医创建科技(深圳)有限公司MediConcepts Technology (Shenzhen) Company Ltd
heading: 1.2 医创建科技(深圳)有限公司MediConcepts Technology (Shenzhen) Company Ltd

text: 医创建科技(深圳) 为医科创建集团提供生产及硏发。在国内的生产设备皆安置于一个洁净车间 环境内，其中包括精密塑料注塑模、装配线、移印、超声波锻接和包装，不仅可供制造第二类医 疗器械，我们亦有设备在相同性质之受控环境下可供制造第一类医疗器械。

1.3 力医疗Nex Medical Ltd.
heading: 1.3 力医疗Nex Medical Ltd.

text: 力医疗主要负责设计，制造及分销腹腔镜医疗设备的业务，定位为一家香港品牌的医疗设备制 造商。力医疗的优势在于它独特的技能及经验：在美国和欧洲的医疗器材专家负责设计，香港 负责制造，而中国作主要的生产。这个独特的组合，确保我们为客户提供创新以及高品质的一 次性腹腔镜设备。力医疗能够提供外科医生所需的高性能，附合人体工程学和高质量方面的医 疗设备。我们承诺聆听医生的需要，结合先进的设计与高端制造技术，使我们超越竞争对手。我 们的使命是改善病人护理，以及保证患者安全。

Nex Medical (NM) is in the business of design, manufacturing and distribution of endoscopic and laparoscopic medical device and is positioned as a Hong Kong brand medical device manufacturer. Nex Medical’s strength is in its unique mix of skills and experience: US and European Device Expertise in designs, Hong Kong managed manufacturing, and China based production. This rare combination ensures that we provide our customers with innovative, high quality disposable laparoscopic devices. Nex Medical design devices that deliver what today’s highly skilled surgeons are looking for in terms of performance, ergonomics and quality. Our commitment to listening to surgeons, combining leading edge design with high-end manufacturing technology, gives us an edge over our competitors. Our mission is to improve patient care and ensure patient safety.

香港负责制造，而中国作主要的生产。这个独特的组合，确保我们为客户提供创新以及高品质 的手術用膠水槍。醫創天工能够提供外科医生所需的高性能，附合人体工程学和高质量方面的 医疗设备。我们承诺聆听医生的需要，结合先进的设计与高端制造技术，使我们超越竞争对手。 我们的使命是改善病人护理，以及保证患者安全。
Medifabrica Lid. (MF) is in the business of design, manufacturing and distribution of minimally invasive

surgery devices and is positioned as an international brand medical device manufacturer. Medifabrica’s strength is in its unique mix of skills and experience: European Device Expertise in designs, Hong Kong

managed manufacturing, and China based production. This rare combination ensures that we provide our customers with innovative, high quality medical devices. Medifabrica’s design devices that deliver what today’s highly skilled surgeons are looking for in terms of performance, ergonomics and quality. Our commitment to listening to surgeons, combining leading edge design with high-end manufacturing technology, gives us an edge over our competitors. Our mission is to improve patient care and ensure patient safety.

2.0 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective
heading: 2.0 质量方针和目标Quality Policy and Objective

text: 质量方针Quality Policy
医科创建集团致力于成为国际顶级供应商，提供高品质，价格合理的器械，辅助外科医生改善病人的 生活素质和针对用户的需求，提供崭新的工程技术方案。

MediConcepts Group’s vision is to be the world’s leading supplier of high quality, cost effective instrumentation, empowering surgeons to provide the patients with an improved quality of life, and to create engineering solutions which truly focus on the user’s needs.
我们承诺致力持续改进我们的医疗器械质量管理体系及提供足够资源，以确保提供完善之服务及满足 客户及法规的要求。我们并以客户之信任及满足作为我们最根本的表现基础。

We strive to continuously improve our processes and resources. We proudly pronounce our commitment to understanding, and meeting customer expectations and regulatory requirements at all times. We take customer satisfaction as the primary measure of our performance.
质量目标QUALITY OBJECTIVE
我们的质量目标是经与我们员工沟通，并依管理层所定之质量方针，以及质量手册所规定的质量体系 要求而制定。具体的质量目标是通过管理评审会议制定

The specified quality objectives are set by the management review meeting and it is our goal that a captioned policy is communicated to all our employees, who will adhere to the spirit of this Quality Policy as well as the quality system requirements set forth in the Quality Manual.
质量目标参照《质量目标一览表》
Quality Objective refers to <Quality Objectives List>
质量方针和质量目标将通过以下途径达成：
The quality policy and objective will be achieved through the following channels: 领导所有员工去建立并维持一个符合0.4.1 所列的标准要求的质量管理体系，满足0.4.2 所列的适用 的法规要求。

Lead all staff to establish and maintain a quality management system in compliance with the requirements stated in section 0.41. The quality management system shall fulfill all relevant regulation requirement.
1) 实施医疗器械国际标准;
Implement the international standards for medical devices; 2) 通过对过程和设备的确认和验证以确保产品在每一个制作过程中之质量﹔
Ensure the product quality in every manufacturing process through validation and verification of the manufacturing processes and equipments; 3) 通过培训所有员工以确保产品质量和效能改进。
Ensure the product quality and improve efficiency by providing training to all staff.

text: For each type, model, and family of medical devices, a technical file or product file either containing or identifying documents defining product specifications and Quality Management System requirements is established and maintained (see 4.2.4). Specifications or procedures for manufacturing, packaging, storage, handling and distribution;
◼ 测量和监视程序；
Procedures for measuring and monitoring;
◼ 臨床評價文件；
Clinical evaluation documentation;
◼ 上市後監督文件；
PMS documentations ;

text: Documented procedures are established to define the controls needed. a) 文件发布前要得到评审和批准。
Documents shall be reviewed and approved prior to issue. b) 必要时对文件进行评审与更新，并再次批准。
When necessary, the documents shall be updated and re-approved. c) 文件的更改和版本号应清晰标识。
Changes in the document and the revision number should be clearly identified. d) 确保适用的最新版本的文件在使用处可供使用。
Ensure that relevant latest version of applicable documents are available at points of use. e) 确保文件保持清晰及易于识别。
Ensure that documents remain legible and readily identifiable. f) 确保外来文件得到识别，并在受控地分发。
Ensure that all foreign documents from an external source are clearly identified and their distribution is controlled. g) 防止文件损坏或丢失；
Prevent deterioration or loss of documents; h) 防止作废文件的非预期使用，及若因任何原因而保留作废文件时，对这些文件进行
适当的标识。

retrievable. A documented procedure shall be established to define the controls needed for
the identification, storage, protection, retrieval, retention time and disposition of records.

text: 最高管理者（指MediConcepts Group 的管理层，包括董事总经理、总经理、研发总监、业务开发总监、
市场总监、品质经理、各部门经理）承诺建立、实施质量管理体系并持续改进其有效性，其承诺可通过
以下方式证明：
Senior management (defined as the management of MediConcepts Group, includes the Managing Director,
General Manager, R&D Director, Business Development President, Marketing Director, Quality Manager and
Managers) is committed to the development and implementation of the Quality Management System and
continually improving its effectiveness, demonstrated by:

The group has the ability to meet the defined requirements.

7.3 设计和开发Design and Development
heading: 7.3 设计和开发Design and Development

text: 7.3.1 总则General 设计过程中遵循的逻辑顺序，确定用户需要，确定设计输入和设计输出。在每一个阶段， 根据设计输入的要求，对设计进行评审和验证，以确保达到功能和操作要求。当设计输
heading: 7.3.1 总则General 设计过程中遵循的逻辑顺序，确定用户需要，确定设计输入和设计输出。在每一个阶段， 根据设计输入的要求，对设计进行评审和验证，以确保达到功能和操作要求。当设计输

text: 入进行了评审，并且设计输入要求确认后，开始输入要求转化为输出反复的过程。设计 和开发程序应形成文件。

The design process follows a logical sequence; define user needs, determining design input requirements and producing the design out. At each stage, the design is reviewed against the input requirements and verified to ensure that functional and operational requirements are

achieved. When the design input has been reviewed and design input requirements accepted, an iterative process of translating requirements into design output commences. The Group shall document procedures for design and development. 7.3.2 设计和开发策划Design and development planning 研发总监及其团队负责确保产品设计和开发均有策划、控制和监督，均达至法规要求和 质量目标。设计计划是一份实时文件，随项目进展而变更、扩展及完善。

R&D Director and his/ her team are responsible to ensure that the product design and development is planned, controlled and monitored, and that regulatory requirements and quality objectives are achieved. A design plan is a living document, which changes, expands, and refined as the project proceeds.
设计和开发策划时，应将以下方面形成文件：
During the design and development planning, the Group shall document: a) 设计和开发的各个阶段；
The design and development stages; b) 每个设计和开发阶段所需的一个或多个评审；
The review(s) needed at each design and development stage; c) 适合于每个设计和开发阶段的验证、确认和设计转换活动；
The verification, validation, and design transfer activities that are appropriate at each design and development stage; d) 设计和开发的职责和权限；
The responsibilities and authorities for design and development; e) 确保设计和开发输出到设计和开发输入的可追溯的方法；
The methods to ensure traceability of design and development outputs to design and development inputs; f) 所需的资源，包括必要的人员能力。
The resources needed, including necessary competence of personnel. 7.3.3 设计和开发输入Design and development inputs

设计输入要求形成最终设计确认的基础。在设计过程的初始阶段，阐述产品概念、扩展、 并转化成一整套设计输入要求，这些要求将转化为一个高层次的设计规范。

During the planning phase of product development, inputs related to product requirement will be determined. These design input requirements form the basis for the eventual validation of the design. In the initial phase of the design process the product concept description is elaborated, expanded and transformed into a complete set of design input requirements which are converted into a high level design specification.
确定并记录与产品要求有关的输入（见4.2.5）
Inputs relating to product requirements are determined and recorded (see 4.2.5) 这些输入包括：
These inputs include
a) 根据预期用途，规定的功能、性能、可用性和安全要求；
Functional, performance, usability and safety requirements, according to the intended use; b) 适用的法规要求和标准；
Applicable regulatory requirements and standards; c) 适用的风险管理的一个或多个输出；
Applicable output(s) of risk management; d) 适当时，来源于以前类似设计的信息；
As appropriate, information derived from previous similar designs; e) 产品和过程的设计和开发所必须的其他要求。
Other requirements essential for design and development of the product and processes. 应对输入进行评审，并批准，以确保设计和开发输入时充分和适宜的。所提出的要求完 成、清楚、能够被验证或确认，并且不能相互矛盾。

These inputs shall be reviewed and for adequacy and approved. Requirements shall be complete, unambiguous, able to be verified or validated, and not in conflict with each other. 7.3.4 设计和开发输出Design and development outputs 设计输出以能够充分满足评估输入的的方式表达，标识产品安全和功能至关重要的特 性，包括生产规格和材料规格等

Design output is expressed in terms that allow adequate assessment of conformance to the input requirements and identify the characteristics of the design that are crucial to the safety and functioning of the device, including production specification, and material specifications, etc. 研发总监负责确保设计和开发输出
The R&D Director is responsible to ensure that the outputs of design and development a) 以表格的形式提出，以验证设计和开发输入，并在放行前得到批准
Are provided in a form that enables verification against the design and development

input and are approved prior to release, b) 满足设计和开发输入的要求
Meet the input requirements for design and development, c) 给出采购、生产和服务提供的适当信息
Provide appropriate information for purchasing, production and service provision, d) 包含或引用产品接收准则
Contain or reference product acceptance criteria, and e) 规定对产品的安全和正常使用所必需的产品特性。
Specify the characteristics of the product that are essential for its safe and proper use. 生产规格包括图纸，配件及原材料规格，包装及标识，IFU，等等。
For the production specifications, it includes drawings, component and material specifications, packaging and labeling, IFU, and etc. 保持设计和开发输出的记录（见4.2.5）。
All Records of the design and development outputs are maintained (see 4.2.5). 7.3.5 设计和开发评审Design and development review 设计评审的目的是在设计初始阶段检测潜在问题，以确保满足设计输入要求，并为对质 量有影响的各部门提供一个评审设计方案的机会，包括：生产、质量、市场或其它专家。

The purpose of design reviews is to detect the potential problems early in the design process, to ensure that the design satisfies the design input requirements and to provide an opportunity for all departments/divisions which have impact on quality including: manufacturing, quality, marketing or other specialists to review design proposals. 计划并执行设计评审，在各阶段末或在设计过程的重要环节，以评估设计结果能满足要 求。

Design reviews are planned and conducted at the end of each phase or at important milestones in the design process to evaluate the ability of the results of the design to meet the requirements. 保存设计和开发评审的所有记录（见4.2.5）。

Records of the results of the reviews and any necessary actions shall be maintained and include the identification of the design under review, the participants involved and the date of the review (see 4.2.5). 7.3.6 设计和开发验证Design and development verification 设计验证是设计的详细测验，按设计计划规定，在设计各阶段完成时进行测试验证。
Design verification is a detailed examination of the design, conducted at the completion of
each stage of the design as identified in the design plan.

验证活动与设计评审相辅相成，作为结构性评估以建立设计输出符合设计输入要求。
The verification activity is part of design review and is a structured assessment to establish that the design output meets the design input requirements. 验证计划需形成文件，包含方法、接收准则、适当时包括包含样本量原理的统计技术。

The Group shall document verification plans that include methods, acceptance criteria and, as appropriate, statistical techniques with rationale for sample size. 部分医疗器械预期用途要求连接至或通过接口连接至其他的医疗器械，验证时应包括 证实连接或通过接口连接时设计输出满足设计输入的要求

If the intended use requires that the medical device be connected to, or have an interface with, other medical device(s), verification shall include confirmation that the design outputs meet design inputs when so connected or interfaced.
记录并保存设计验证的所有记录（见4.2.5）。
All results of the design verifications are recorded and maintained (see 4.2.5) 7.3.7 设计和开发确认Design and development validation 设计确认是所有努力的总和，确保设计满足最终用户及患者的需求和预期用途。设计确 认对生产首件进行，而不是模型。

Design validation is the cumulative summation of all efforts to ensure that the design will confirm to the end user and patient needs and the intended use. It is performed on the initial production units, not prototypes.
确定接收标准时，被评估和确认的参数在设计策划阶段予以识别。 The performance characteristics to be assessed and validated are identified at the design planning stage when the acceptance criteria are established.
成品实际环境的性能测试可在仿真环境进行，如温度，震动和摇摆等。
Finished devices are tested for performance under actual conditions of use and may be subjected to simulated environmental conditions, such as temperature, shock, and vibration, etc.
产品临床评估在过程确认阶段进行，如要求临床研究，应符合适当的法规要求。确认也 记录将影响客户、最终用户和患者的设计问题。保存设计确认活动记录，作为技术档案 的一部分（见4.2.5）。

Clinical evaluation of the device is undertaken during the validation process and if clinical investigations are required, these shall conform to the appropriate regulatory requirements. Validation also addresses aspects of the design, which may have implications for the customer, end user and patient. The design validation activity is recorded and maintained as the part of the technical file. (see 4.2.5).

7.3.8 设计和开发转换 Design and development transfer 集团公司应将设计和开发输出向制造转换的程序形成文件，这些程序应确保设计和开 发输出在成为最终生产规范前经验证适合于制造并确保生产能力能满足产品要求。应 记录转换的结果和结论（见4.2.5）

text: The Group shall document procedures for transfer of design and development outputs to manufacturing. These procedures shall ensure that design and development outputs are verified as suitable for manufacturing before becoming final production specifications and that production capability can meet product requirements. 集团公司应将设计和开发更改的程序形成文件。应确定更改对于医疗器械功能、性能、 可用性、安全、0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求及其预期用途等的重要程度。

The Group shall document procedures to control design and development changes. The Group shall determine the significance of the change to function, performance, usability, safety and applicable regulatory requirements listed in 0.4.2 for the medical device and its intended use. 应识别设计和开发的更改。更改在实施前应经：
Design and development changes shall be identified. Before implementation, the changes shall be: a) 评审；
reviewed; b) 验证；
verified; c) 适当时，确认；
validated, as appropriate; d) 批准。
approved; 设计和开发更改的评审应包括评价更改对 在制的或已交付的组成部件和产品的影响， 以及对风险管理的输入或输出和产品实现过程的影响。

The review of design and development changes shall include evaluation of the effect of the changes on constituent parts and product in process or already delivered, inputs or outputs of risk management and product realization processes. 应保留更改及评审和任何必要的措施的记录（见4.2.5）
Records of changes, their review and any necessary actions shall be maintained (see 4.2.5). 7.3.10 设计和开发文档 Documents of design and development
集团公司就每个医疗器械类型或医疗器械族保留设计和开发文档，文档应包含或引用 形成的记录以证明符合设计和开发要求，该文档还应包含设计和开发更改的记录。

heading: 7.4 采购Purchasing

text: 7.4.1 采购过程Purchasing process
heading: 7.4.1 采购过程Purchasing process

text: 应将确保采购的产品符合规定的采购信息的程序形成文件（见4.2.4）。
The Group shall document procedures (see 4.2.4) to ensure that purchased product conforms to specified purchasing information. 建立评价和选择供方的准则，准则应：
The Group shall establish criteria for the evaluation and selection of suppliers. The criteria shall be: a) 基于供方提供满足组织要求的产品的能力；
Based on the supplier’s ability to provide product that meets the organization’s requirements; b) 基于供方的绩效；
Based on the performance of the supplier; c) 基于采购产品对医疗器械质量的影响；
Based on the effect of the purchased product on the quality of the medical device; d) 与医疗器械相关风险相适应。
Proportionate to the risk associated with the medical device. 总经理对采购部提出的新供应商的核准有最终决定权。采购经理负责协调供方的监视
和再评价活动，并报告供方满足采购产品的要求的绩效，其结果应为供方再评价过程提 供输入。

The General Manager has the final authority of approving new supplier proposed by Purchasing. Purchasing Manager shall plan the monitoring and re-evaluation of suppliers. Supplier performance in meeting requirements for the purchased product shall be monitored.
The results of the monitoring shall provide an input into the supplier re-evaluation process. 供应商的核准可通过对产品样板的评估或文件评审等方法。供应商的业绩应予监控并 定期评估。
Suppliers may be approved by means of evaluation of product samples or documentation
review, etc. The performance of suppliers is monitored and evaluated periodically. 对未实现采购要求的供方的处置应与所采购产品有关的风险相适应，并符合适用的法 规要求

Non-fulfilment of purchasing requirements shall be addressed with the supplier proportionate to the risk associated with the purchased product and compliance with applicable regulatory requirements. 供方能力或绩效的评价、选择、监视和再评价的结果及由这些活动所引起的任何必要措

7.4.2 采购信息Purchasing Information
heading: 7.4.2 采购信息Purchasing Information

text: 采购部负责确保：
Purchasing is responsible to ensure: 拟采购产品的采购信息应表述或引用，适当时包括：
Purchasing information shall describe or reference the product to be purchased, including as appropriate:
a) 产品规范；

b) 产品接收、程序、过程和设备的要求；

适用时，采购信息应包括书面协议，该协议明确了在影响采购产品满足规定的采购要求 的能力的任何更改实施前，供方应将采购产品方面的更改通知集团公司。

Purchasing information shall include, as applicable, a written agreement that the supplier notify the Group of changes in the purchased product prior to implementation of any changes that affect the ability of the purchased product to meet specified purchase requirements. 采购信息由采购部按照7.5.9 规定的可追溯性要求的范围和程度，以文件（见4.2.4）和 记录（见4.2.5）的形式保持。
To the extent required for traceability given in 7.5.9, the Group shall maintain relevant purchasing information in the form of documents (see 4.2.4) and records (see 4.2.5).

7.5 生产提供Production Provision
heading: 7.5 生产提供Production Provision

text: 7.5.1 生产提供的控制Control of production provision
heading: 7.5.1 生产提供的控制Control of production provision

text: 生产经理应对生产提供予以策划、实施、监视和控制以确保产品符合规范，适当时包
括但不限于：
Production and service provision shall be planned, carried out, monitored and controlled to
ensure that product conforms to specification. As appropriate, production controls shall
include but are not limited to:
a) 编制生产控制程序和控制方法的文件（见4.2.4）；
Documentation of procedures and methods for the control of production (see 4.2.4);
b) 基础设施鉴定；
Qualification of infrastructure;
c) 实施过程参数和产品特性的监视和测量；
Implementation of monitoring and measurement of process parameters and product
characteristics;
d) 获得和使用监视和测量设备；
Availability and use of monitoring and measuring equipment;
e) 对标记和包装实施规定的操作；
Implementation of defined operations for labelling and packaging;
f) 实施产品放行、交付和交付后活动。
Implementation of product release, delivery and post-delivery activities.
公司应保持每一批医疗器械的记录（见4.2.5），提供可追溯到各部件的批号，并标
明生产数量和批准销售的数量。每批的记录应由指定人员加以验证和批准。
Company should establish the necessary processes to maintain records (see 4.2.5) for
each lot of medical devices that provides traceability to the lot numbers of the
component parts and identifies the amount manufactured and amount approved for
distribution. The lot records are verified and approved by designated personnel.
7.5.2 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product
heading: 7.5.2 产品的清洁Cleanliness of product

text: 在下列情况下，应将产品的清洁或污染控制要求形成文件：
The Group shall document requirements for cleanliness of product or contamination
control of product if:
a) 产品在灭菌或使用前由组织进行清洁；
Product is cleaned by the organization prior to sterilization or its use;
b) 产品是以非无菌形式提供且需在灭菌或使用前进行清洁处理；

Product is supplied non-sterile and is to be subjected to a cleaning process prior to
sterilization or its use;
c) 产品在灭菌或使用前不能进行清洁处理，使用时其清洁是至关重要的；
Product cannot be cleaned prior to sterilization or its use, and its cleanliness is of
significance in use;
d) 提供的产品为非无菌使用，使用时其清洁是至关重要的；
Product is supplied to be used non-sterile, and its cleanliness is of significance in use;
e) 在制造过程中从产品中除去过程添加物。
Process agents are to be removed from product during manufacture.
若产品是按照上述a）或b）的要求进行清洁，则6.4.1 中包含的要求不适用于
清洁处理前的过程。
If product is cleaned in accordance with a) or b) above, the requirements contained
in 6.4.1 do not apply prior to the cleaning process.

text: 7.5.5 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement
heading: 7.5.5 无菌医疗器械的专用要求 Sterile Medical Device Special Requirement

text: 若产品以无菌形式提供，品质经理负责对每一生产批产品的灭菌过程参数进行记录，
形成灭菌记录，保持于DCC。
The Group shall maintain records of the sterilization process parameters used for each
sterilization batch (see 4.2.5). Sterilization records shall be traceable to each production
batch of medical devices.
7.5.6 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision
heading: 7.5.6 生产提供过程的确认 Validation of processes for production provision

text: 对特殊的过程实施确认，包括灭菌过程，以证明这些过程实现所策划的结果的能力
Validation is performed for special processes, including the sterilization processes, to
demonstrate the ability of these processes to achieve planned results.
将过程确认程序形成文件，过程确认包括：
The Group shall document procedures for validation of processes, including:
a) 为过程的评审和批准所规定的准则﹔
Defined criteria for review and approval of the processes, b) 设备鉴定和人员资格的鉴定﹔
Approval of equipment and qualification of personnel,

Use of specific methods, procedures and acceptance criteria; d) 适当时包括包含样本量原理的统计技术；
As appropriate, statistical techniques with rationale for sample sizes; e) 记录的要求（见4.2.5）； requirement for records (see 4.2.5)； f) 再确认，包括再确认的准则。

Approval of changes to the processes.
集团公司将用于生产提供的计算机软件应用的确认程序形成文件，此类软件的应用
在首次使用前应予以确认，适当时，此类软件或其应用更改后也应予以确认。有关
软件确认和再确认的特定方法和活动应与软件使用有关的风险（包括对产品符合规

保留确认的结果和结论以及确认所采取的必要措施的记录（见4.2.4 和4.2.5）。
The Group shall document procedures for the validation of the application of computer
software used in production and service provision. Such software applications shall be
validated prior to initial use and, as appropriate, after changes to such software or its
application. The specific approach and activities associated with software validation and
revalidation shall be proportionate to the risk associated with the use of the software,
including the effect on the ability of the product to conform to specifications.
Records of the results and conclusion of validation and necessary actions from the
validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5).
7.5.7 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求
heading: 7.5.7 灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统确认的专用要求

text: Particular requirements for validation of processes for sterilization and sterile barrier
systems
集团公司将灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统的确认程序形成文件（见4.2.4）
The organization shall document procedures (see 4.2.4) for the validation of processes for
sterilization and sterile barrier systems.
灭菌过程和无菌屏障系统应在实施前得到确认，适当时，还应在后续的产品或过程更
改实施前得到确认。
Processes for sterilization and sterile barrier systems shall be validated prior to
implementation and following product or process changes, as appropriate.

validation shall be maintained (see 4.2.4 and 4.2.5).
7.5.8 标识Identification
heading: 7.5.8 标识Identification

text: 产品实现的全过程中的产品均依照形成文件的程序使用适宜的方法予以识别
Products are identified by suitable means throughout product realization in accordance with
the documented procedures
在产品实现的整个过程中按照监视和测量要求识别产品的状态。在产品的生产、贮存
的全过程中应保持产品状态的标识，确保只有通过所要求的检验和试验或经授权让步
放行的产品才能被发送或使用。
The Group shall identify product status with respect to monitoring and measurement
requirements throughout product realization. Identification of product status shall be
maintained throughout production, storage, installation and servicing of product to ensure
that only product that has passed the required inspections and tests or released under an
authorized concession is dispatched or used.
如0.4.2 所列的适用的法规有要求，应将为医疗器械指定唯一器械标识的系统形成文
件。仅NM 的产品适用此条款，其他的代加工产品，由对应的客户为医疗器械指定唯
一器械标识的系统形成文件。
If required by applicable regulatory requirements (see 0.4.2), the Group shall document a
system to assign unique device identification to the medical device. This regulation is only
valid to NM product. Client is responsible for document a system to assign unique device
identification to the respective OEM medical device.
集团公司应建立程序并形成文件以确保返回的医疗器械能被识别且能与合格品区分开
来。
The organization shall document procedures to ensure that medical devices returned to the
Group are identified and distinguished from conforming product.

define the extent of traceability in accordance with applicable regulatory

7.5.10 顾客财产Customer property
heading: 7.5.10 顾客财产Customer property

text: 集团公司维护在公司控制下或使用的客户财产。公司识别、验证、保护和维护供其使用 或构成产品一部分的客户财产。当客户财产发生丢失、损坏或发现不适用的情况时，应 报告客户并保持记录（见4.2.5）。

The Group exercises care with customer property while it is under the Group’s control or being used by the Group. The Group identifies, verifies, protects and safeguards customer property provided for use or incorporation into the product. If any customer property is lost, damaged or otherwise found to be unsuitable for use, this shall be reported to the customer and records maintained (see 4.2.5).
7.5.11 产品防护Preservation of Product
heading: 7.5.11 产品防护Preservation of Product

text: 集团公司应建立为使产品在加工、贮存、处置和流通期间符合要求而提供防护的程序并 形成文件，防护适用于医疗器械的组成部分。
The Group shall document procedures for preserving the conformity of product to requirements during processing, storage, handling, and distribution. Preservation shall apply
to the constituent parts of a medical device.
在产品的加工、贮存、处置和流通期间，当其暴露于预期条件和危险（源）时，集团公 司应通过以下方式防止产品发现变化、污染或损坏：

The Group shall protect product from alteration, contamination or damage when exposed to expected conditions and hazards during processing, storage, handling, and distribution by: a) 设计和制作适当的包装和货运包装箱；
Designing and constructing suitable packaging and shipping containers; b) 如果包装本身不能提供防护，将所需的特殊条件要求形成文件。
Documenting requirements for special conditions needed if packaging alone cannot provide preservation. 如果要求特殊条件，其应受控并予以记录（见4.2.5）
If special conditions are required, they shall be controlled and recorded (see 4.2.5).

7.6 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices
heading: 7.6 监控和测量设备的控制Control of monitoring and measuring devices

text: 生产部和质量部负责确定各自责任范围的需实施的监控和测量以及所需的监控和测量装置，为 产品符合确定的要求提供证据(见7.2.1)。

Production and Quality are responsible to determine and establish monitoring and measurement processes to be undertaken in their responsible areas and provide evidence of conformity that products and components conform to specific requirements (see 7.2.1).
集团公司建立了形成文件的程序以确保监控和测量活动可行并以与监控和测量要求相一致的方 式实施。
Documented procedures are established to ensure that monitoring and measurement can be carried out and are carried out in a manner that is consistent with the monitoring and measurement

requirements. These procedures included instructions for the use of test equipment to verify product conformity and where necessary, verification of the environmental condition necessary to perform testing. 为确保结果有效，必要时，测量设备应：
Where necessary to ensure valid results, measuring equipments are: a) 对照能溯源到国际或国家标准的测量标准，按照规定的时间间隔或在使用前进行校准或检定；
当不存在上述标准时，应记录校准或检定的依据（见4.2.5）；

Calibrated or verified at specified intervals, or prior to use, against measurement standards traceable to international or national measurement standards; where no such standards exist, the basis used for calibration or verification shall be recorded（see 4.2.5）; b) 进行调整或必要时再调整；应记录这种调整或再调整（见4.2.5）；
Be adjusted or re-adjusted as necessary: such adjustments or re-adjustments shall be recorded(see 4.2.5); c) 得到识别，以确定其校准状态；
Identified to enable the calibration status to be determined; d) 防止可能使测量结果失效的调整；
Safeguarded from adjustments that would invalidate the measurement result; e) 在搬运、维护和贮存期间防止损坏或失效。
Protected from damage and deterioration during handling, maintenance and storage. 集团公司应按照形成文件的程序执行校准或鉴定
The Group shall perform calibration or verification in accordance with documented procedures.
此外，当发现设备不符合要求时，对以往测量结果的有效性予以评价和记录，并对该设备和任 何受影响的产品采取适当的措施。品质工程师负责测量设备的校准和验证并保持校准和验证结 果的记录（见4.2.5）。

8.0 测量、分析和改进Measurement, analysis and improvement
heading: 8.0 测量、分析和改进Measurement, analysis and improvement

text: 8.1 总则General
heading: 8.1 总则General

text: 监控、测量、分析和改进过程（包括对适用方法、统计技术及其应用程度）均予以策划和实施以

The monitoring, measurement, analysis and improvement processes (including determination of applicable methods, statistical techniques and the extent of their use) are planned and implemented to a) 证实产品的符合性﹔
demonstrate conformity of the product, b) 确保质量管理体系的符合性，及
ensure conformity of the Quality Management System, and c) 持续改进质量管理体系的有效性。
continually improve the effectiveness of the Quality Management System.

8.2 监控和测量Monitoring and measuring
heading: 8.2 监控和测量Monitoring and measuring

text: 8.2.1 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction
heading: 8.2.1 反馈/客户满意Feedback/Customer satisfaction

text: 作为对质量管理体系业绩的一种测量，与以下方面相关的信息均予以监控
As one of the measurements of the performance of the Quality Management System, the information relating to the following is monitored a) 是否已满足客户的要求，及/或
whether the Group has met customer requirements, and/or b) 客户对集团公司印象中，集团公司是否已满足其要求
customer perception as to whether the Group has met customer requirements
获取和利用这种信息的方法，如拜访客户、电话或电邮调查，由市场总监确定。
The methods, such as visiting customers or by phone or e-mail surveys, for obtaining information are determined by the Marketing Director. 集团公司应建立反馈系统的形成文件的程序，该反馈过程应包括从生产和生产后活动中 收集数据的规定。
The Group shall document procedures for the feedback process. This feedback process shall include provisions to gather data from production as well as post-production activities.
从反馈过程中收集的信息应用作为监视和保持产品要求的风险管理的潜在输入以及产品 实现或改进过程的潜在输入。

The information gathered in the feedback process shall serve as potential input into risk management for monitoring and maintaining the product requirements as well as the product realization or improvement processes.
对从生产后阶段获取的经验的评审构成反馈系统的一部分。
The review of the experience gained from the post-production phase forms part of the feedback system.
8.2.2 投诉处置Complaint handling
heading: 8.2.2 投诉处置Complaint handling

text: 集团公司应按照0.4.1 所列标准及0.4.2 所列适用的法规要求将及时处置投诉的程序形成 文件。
The Group shall document procedures for timely complaint handling in accordance with applicable regulatory requirements (see 0.4.1 and 0.4.2). 这些程序应包括对以下方面的最低要求和职责：
These procedures shall include at a minimum requirements and responsibilities for: a) 接收和记录信息；
Receiving and recording information;

Evaluating information to determine if the feedback constitutes a complaint; c) 调查投诉；
Investigating complaints; d) 确定是否需要向适当的监管机构报告信息；
Determining the need to report the information to the appropriate regulatory authorities; e) 处置与投诉有关的产品；
Handling of complaint-related product; f) 确定是否需要启动纠正或纠正措施。
Determining the need to initiate corrections or corrective actions. 如果有任何投诉未经调查，应记录理由。应记录由投诉处置过程形成的任何纠正或纠正措 施。

If any complaint is not investigated, justification shall be documented. Any correction or corrective action resulting from the complaint handling process shall be documented. 如果一项调查确定是组织外的活动导致了投诉，则应在组织和所涉及的外部方之间交换 相关信息。

If an investigation determines activities outside the organization contributed to the complaint, relevant information shall be exchanged between the organization and the external party involved. 应保留投诉处置记录（见4.2.5）
Records of reporting to regulatory authorities shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).

heading: 8.2.3 向监管机构报告Reporting to regulatory authorities

text: 如果0.4.2 所列的适用的法规有要求，将符合不良事件报告准则的投诉或发布的忠告性通 知报告，则组织应将向有关的监管机构报告的程序形成文件。

If applicable regulatory requirements (see 0.4.2) require notification of complaints that meet specified reporting criteria of adverse events or issuance of advisory notices, the organization shall document procedures for providing notification to the appropriate regulatory authorities. 应保留向监管机构报告的记录（见4.2.5）
Records of reporting to regulatory authorities shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).

heading: 8.2.4 内部审核Internal audit

text: 按计划的时间间隔进行内部审核以确定质量管理体系是否：
Internal audits are conducted at planned intervals to determine whether the Quality Management System:

a) 符合策划并形成文件的安排、0.4.1 所列标准的要求、0.4.2 所列适用法规的要求及本质
量手册所描述的质量管理体系要求；

Comply with plan and produce documents which fulfill the specifications stated in section 0.4.1, regulations stated in section 0.4.2 and the quality management system requirement mentioned in this quality manual b) 得到有效地实施和保持。
Is effectively implemented and maintained. 策划了一个审核方案，考虑拟审核的过程和区域的状况和重要性，以及以往审核的结果。 审核准则以0.4.1 所列的标准为基础。根据内部审核程序，本手册所描述的整个质量管理 体系应至少每年审核2 次。审核员的选择和审核的实施，审核过程的客观性和公证性均得 到确保。审核员不得审核自己的工作。
An audit program is planned, taking into consideration of the status and importance of the

processes and areas to be audited, as well as the results of previous audits. The audit criteria are based on the specifications listed in section 0.4.1. The whole Quality Management System described in this Quality Manual is audited at least twice a year according to the internal quality procedure. Selection of auditors and conduct of audits are such that objectivity and impartiality of the audit process are ensured. Auditors are not allowed to audit their own work. 审核包括评估：
Audits include the evaluation of:
a) 活动、过程和工作区域
Activities, processes, and work areas. b) 质量实践，体系程序和工作指引
Quality practices, system procedures and work instructions c) 证明文件及记录等
Certification documents and records, etc. 部门负责人确保及时采取措施以消除在各自负责区域所发现的不合格及其原因。

Department heads are responsible to ensure that actions are taken without undue delay to eliminate the nonconformities identified in their responsible areas and their causes 管理者代表应对所采取措施的验证及验证结果的报告。(见8.5.2)
The Management Representative is responsible for the verification of the actions taken and the reporting of verification results (see 8.5.2).
8.2.5 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes
heading: 8.2.5 过程的监控和测量Monitoring and measurement of processes

text: 采用适宜的方法对质量管理体系过程进行监控，并在适当时进行测量。这些方法应证实过 程实现所策划的结果的能力。当未能达到所策划的结果时，应采取适当的纠正和纠正措施， 以确保产品的符合性。

8.2.6 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product
heading: 8.2.6 产品的监视和测量Monitoring and measurement of product

text: 在产品实现过程的适当阶段，根据所策划的安排和形成文件的程序对产品的特性予以监 控和测量以验证产品要求已得到满足。这种监视和测量应依据策划并形成文件的安排和 形成文件的程序，在产品实现过程的适当阶段进行。
The Group shall monitor and measure the characteristics of the product to verify that product

requirements have been met. This shall be carried out at applicable stages of the product realization process in accordance with the planned and documented arrangements and documented procedures. 保持符合接收准则的证据。对有权放行产品的人员予以记录（见4.2.5）。适当时，记录 应识别用于执行测量活动的检测设备

Evidence of conformity to the acceptance criteria shall be maintained. The identity of the person authorizing release of product shall be recorded (see 4.2.5). As appropriate, records shall identify the test equipment used to perform measurement activities. 只有在策划的安排已圆满完成时，才能放行产品。如果，万一货期紧急，必须得到客户的 批准才能在测试完成之前放行产品并且测试必须在产品使用之前完成。

Product release and service delivery shall not proceed until the planned and documented arrangements have been satisfactorily completed. If, in case of urgent delivery, products are shipped before completion of testing, it must be approved by the customer and test must be completed before the products are used.

8.3 不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product
heading: 8.3 不合格品控制Control of nonconforming product

text: 8.3.1 总则General
heading: 8.3.1 总则General

text: 对不符合产品要求的产品予以识别和控制以防止非预期的使用或交付。不合格产品应放
置在隔离区直到不符合项得以解决。不合格产品的控制及与不合格品识别、记录、隔
离、评价和处置相关职责和权限应于文件化程序中规定。不合格的评价应包括确定是否
需要调查和通知对不合格负责的所有外部方。
The Group shall ensure that product which does not conform to product requirements
identified and controlled to prevent its unintended use or delivery. The organization shall
document a procedure to define the controls and related responsibilities and authorities for
the identification, documentation, segregation, evaluation and disposition of nonconforming
product.
应保留不合格的性质以及随后所采取的任何措施的记录，包括评价、任何调查和决策的
理由说明（见4.2.5）
Nonconforming product shall be reserved and record implemented follow-up action including
evaluation, investigation and decision making reason.
8.3.2 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施
heading: 8.3.2 交付前发现不合格品的响应措施

text: Actions in response to nonconforming product detected before delivery
集团公司应通过下列一种或几种途径处置不合格品：
The Group shall deal with nonconforming product by one or more of the following ways:
a) 采取措施以消除已发现的不合格；
Taking action to eliminate the detected nonconformity; b) 采取措施以防止其原预期的使用或应用；
Taking action to preclude its original intended use or application; c) 授权让步使用、放行或接收。
Authorizing its use, release or acceptance under concession. 应确保不合格品仅在提供理由、获得批准和满足适用法规要求的情况下才能让步接收。应 保留让步接收和授权让步人员身份的记录（见4.2.5）

The Group shall ensure that nonconforming product is accepted by concession only if the justification is provided, approval is obtained and applicable regulatory requirements are met. Records of the acceptance by concession and the identity of the person authorizing the concession shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).

8.3.4 返工 Rework
heading: 8.3.4 返工 Rework

text: 集团公司应按照考虑了返工对产品的潜在不良影响所形成文件的程序进行返工。这些程
序应经过与原程序相同的评审和批准。
The Group shall perform rework in accordance with documented procedures that takes into
account the potential adverse effect of the rework on the product. These procedures shall
undergo the same review and approval as the original procedure.
返工完成后，产品应经验证以确保其满足适用的接收准则和法规要求。
After the completion of rework, product shall be verified to ensure that it meets applicable
acceptance criteria and regulatory requirements.

8.4 数据分析Analysis of data
heading: 8.4 数据分析Analysis of data

text: 集团公司应将确定、收集和分析适当数据的程序形成文件以证实质量管理体系的适应性、充分 性和有效性。这些程序应包括对统计技术在内的适当方法及其适用程度的确定。

The Group shall document procedures to determine, collect and analyse appropriate data to demonstrate the suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the quality management system. The procedures shall include determination of appropriate methods, including statistical techniques and the extent of their use. 数据分析应包括来自监视和测量的结果以及其他有关来源的数据，并至少包括以下方面输入：
The analysis of data shall include data generated as a result of monitoring and measurement and from other relevant sources and include, at a minimum, input from: a) 反馈；
Feedback； b) 产品要求的符合性；
conformity to product requirements; c) 过程和产品的特性及趋势，包括改进的机会；
Characteristics and trends of processes and product, including opportunities for improvement; d) 供方；
Suppliers; e) 审核；
Audits; f) 适当时，服务报告
Service reports, as appropriate. 如果数据分析表明质量管理体系不是适宜的、充分的或有效的，组织应按照8.5 的要求将此分 析结果用作改进的输入。

If the analysis of data shows that the quality management system is not suitable, adequate or effective, the organization shall use this analysis as input for improvement as required in 8.5. 数据分析结果的记录应予保持（见4.2.5）。
Records of the results of the analysis are maintained (see 4.2.5).

8.5 改进Improvement
heading: 8.5 改进Improvement

text: 8.5.1 总则General
heading: 8.5.1 总则General

text: 确保质量管理体系的持续适宜性、充分性和有效性以及医疗器械的安全和性能，应利用 质量方针、质量目标、审核结果、上市后监督、数据分析、纠正措施、预防措施和管理 评审来识别和实施任何必要的更改。

The Group shall identify and implement any changes necessary to ensure and maintain the continued suitability, adequacy and effectiveness of the quality management system as well as medical device safety and performance through the use of the quality policy, quality objectives, audit results, post market surveillance, analysis of data, corrective actions, preventive actions and management review.
8.5.2 纠正措施Corrective action
heading: 8.5.2 纠正措施Corrective action

text: 采取适宜的纠正措施以消除不合格的原因，防止不合格项发生。不合格由以下途径提 出：内审、外审、不合格报告、客户投诉，后期项目评审等，纠正措施应无不当拖延。 纠正措施应与不合格的影响程度相适应。

Appropriate corrective actions are taken to eliminate the causes of nonconformities in order to prevent recurrence. Non-conformances are raised in the following areas: internal audits, external audits, non-conformance reports, customer complaints, post project reviews and etc. Corrective actions shall not have inappropriate delay and shall be conducted in accordance with the severity of nonconformities. 集团公司建立形成文件的程序以规定以下方面的要求
A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 评审不合格（包括投诉）；
Reviewing nonconformities (including complaints), b) 确定不合格的原因；
Determining the causes of nonconformities, c) 评估和确保不合格不再发生的措施的需求；
Evaluating the need for action to ensure that nonconformities do not recur, d) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; e) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
及
Verifying that the corrective action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; and f) 评审所采取的纠正措施的有效性。
Reviewing the effectiveness of corrective action taken.

Records of the results of any investigation and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
8.5.3 预防措施Preventive action
heading: 8.5.3 预防措施Preventive action

text: 采取适宜的预防措施消除潜在不合格的原因，防止不合格发生。原因来源对内审、外审、 不合格报告、客户反馈等的评审。

Appropriate preventive actions are taken to eliminate the causes of any potential nonconformity, in order to prevent their occurrence. Their causes are from the reviews of internal audits, external audits, non-conformance reports, customer feedback, etc. 集团公司建立形成文件的程序以规定以下方面的要求：
A documented procedure is established to define requirements for a) 确定潜在不合格及其原因；
Determining potential nonconformities and their causes; b) 评估和防止不合格发生的措施的需求；
Evaluating the need for action to prevent occurrence of nonconformities; c) 对所需的措施进行策划、形成文件并实施，适当时，包括更新文件；
Planning and documenting action needed and implementing such action, including, as appropriate, updating documentation; d) 验证纠正措施对满足适用的法规要求的能力和对医疗器械的安全和性能无不良影响；
Verifying that the action does not adversely affect the ability to meet applicable regulatory requirements or the safety and performance of the medical device; e) 适当时，评审所采取的预防措施的有效性。
Reviewing the effectiveness of the preventive action taken, as appropriate.
应保留任何调查的结果和所采取措施的记录（见4.2.5）
Records of the results of any investigations and of action taken shall be maintained (see 4.2.5).
